user.title: Mail Server
user.description: Enter the IMAP server details for the mailbox that receives print jobs.

data_description.allowed_senders: Only emails from these addresses will trigger a print job.
data_description.imap_folder: The IMAP folder to watch for new messages (e.g. INBOX).

printer.title: Printer
printer.description: Enter the CUPS server details and the printer queue name.

data_description.cups_url: Base URL of your CUPS server, e.g. http://10.0.0.23:631
data_description.printer_name: The queue name as registered in CUPS, e.g. Canon_MG3600_series

error.cannot_connect_imap: Cannot connect to the IMAP server. Check the host and port.
error.cannot_connect_cups: Cannot reach the CUPS server. Check the URL.
error.unknown: Unexpected error — see the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This mail account is already configured.

data_description.booklet_patterns: If the PDF filename contains any of these substrings the job is printed as a booklet (two-sided short-edge with pages reordered).
data_description.queue_folder: Folder where PDFs are saved before printing. Must be writable by Home Assistant.
